SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF UNION STREET GRAGE, REPRESETNED BY JONATHAN BARTUNEK, OWNER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LEONARD J. O'KEEFE IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNION STREET GARAGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT O'KEEFE, LEONARD J. $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,050.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
